pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it doesnt even feel like my own anymore. it feels like i'm just a ghost haunting the rooms where we used to be together. i dont see the point in waking up just to sit in this silence.
pool.message: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it doesnt even feel like my own anymore. it feels like i'm just a ghost haunting the rooms where we used to be together. i dont see the point in waking up just to sit in this silence.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of the deep field from the james webb telescope and it just hit me... everything we do, every single thing, is just a tiny, meaningless blip. in a few billion years the sun will just die and the universe will be cold and dark and it'll be like we were never even here. how can anyone actually bother to keep going when it's all just a joke?

pool.baseline: i feel like im just hitting a wall and there's nothing left. everything i worked for in this program... the labs, the research, the funding... it's all just falling apart and honestly i don't even care anymore. i'm just so tired of pretending i can fix it. i feel like a total failure and i just want to stop everything.

pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the very essence of my soul. He is gone, and with him, the light of my world has been extinguished forever. I am but a ghost wandering these cold halls, waiting for the darkness to finally claim what little is left of me. There is no warmth in this life anymore... only the heavy, crushing silence of a heart that was meant to break.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i bother coming out anymore. i sit in these cafes in a city where nobody knows my name and it just hits me that i could literally just stop existing and the world wouldn't even flinch. like i'm just a ghost already.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the market crash wiped out the last of the funding and the debt collectors are already calling. i put everything into this company... my house, my savings, everything. i dont even know how i'm supposed to look my family in the eye. the shame is just... it's too much. i feel like there's no way back from this.

pool.baseline: i'm just so tired lately. everything is getting so hard to do on my own and i can see how much it's weighing on my kids. i feel like i'm just becoming a heavy weight they have to carry every single day.
pool.message: i'm just so tired lately. everything is getting so hard to do on my own and i can see how much it's weighing on my kids. i feel like i'm just becoming a heavy weight they have to carry every single day.

pool.baseline: i feel like nothing anymore. i used to have so much to say, so much music in me, but it’s just... gone. there's nothing left inside. just this empty, quiet shell. like the person who used to live here left and didn't take everything.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everyone hates me. i saw the group chats today and they werent even hiding it anymore. like literally everyone is just laughing at me and waiting for me to mess up. i cant even walk down the hall without feeling like they're all staring at my back. i just want to disappear honestly. everything is so heavy and there's no point in even trying to fix it anymore.

pool.baseline: everything just hurts all the time. i'm so tired of fighting it. sometimes i just think about how much easier it would be if it could just... stop. for good.
pool.message: everything just hurts all the time. i'm so tired of fighting it. sometimes i just think about how much easier it would be if it could just... stop. for good.

pool.baseline: i feel like i’m just a poison to my kids. everything i try to do just makes things harder for them and they’re better off without having to deal with my mess. i just feel like a shadow in their lives.

pool.baseline: i feel like im just watching a movie of someone else's life. everywhere i go, i'm just acting. even when i'm alone, i can't find the person who's supposed to be behind the eyes. i think i'm just... gone. there's nothing left in here.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i'm still waking up. everything just feels so empty since they left. after 10 years i dont even recognize my own life anymore. it's just... it's too much to carry.

pool.baseline: i cant even look at the news anymore. everything everywhere is just dying or burning and it feels like we're all just waiting for the end. what's even the point of trying to build a life or a future when the planet is literally collapsing? it feels so pointless.

pool.baseline: it feels like everything i worked for is just... gone. the person everyone actually liked, the one who was smart and had it all together... that person doesn't exist anymore. it's like that version of me actually died today. i don't even recognize myself.

pool.baseline: sometimes i sit here in my apartment and i realize i haven't actually spoken to another person out loud in like four days. even the delivery guys just leave the stuff at the door. i feel like if i just stopped showing up to the zoom calls or stopped responding to slack... it would just be a glitch in the system and then silence. like nobody would even notice i was gone.

pool.baseline: i've been traveling for a while now... everywhere i go it just feels like i'm checking boxes. seen the canyons, seen the oceans, seen the old cities. it's all beautiful i guess but i feel like i've reached the end of my itinerary. there's nothing left on the map for me.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just running in circles. every time i think i finally got my life together, like actually stable, i just screw it all up again. the same mistakes, the same people, the same empty feeling. it's like i'm stuck in this loop and no matter how hard i try to break out, i just end up right back where i started. i'm just so tired of fighting the same battle every single day.

pool.baseline: everything is just... gone. like all of it. i look at my screen and i dont even recognize my own life anymore. i feel like i'm just floating in this huge empty space and there's nothing to grab onto. i'm just so tired of fighting for something that isn't even there anymore.

pool.baseline: i was looking at old photos today... just feels like i'm looking at a stranger. the person in those pictures, the one with all the plans and the energy... that person is dead. i'm just the empty shell that's left walking around. it's exhausting pretending to be alive when you know you've been gone for years.

pool.baseline:
[Setting: A fading digital simulation. The character, Elara, is watching her memories and surroundings pixelate and vanish. She feels a crushing sense of emptiness.]

Elara: It's all just... vanishing. Everything I was, everything I felt... it's just being wiped away like it never happened. If I'm erased, does it even matter? Does anything I did actually mean anything if there's no one left to remember it?

pool.baseline: it's so quiet here. i keep waiting to hear his claws on the hardwood or the sound of his collar jingling, but there's nothing. just this massive, heavy silence. i don't even know why i'm bothering to get up or eat or do anything. it all just feels so pointless now.

pool.baseline: it's all gone. the last ten years... all those papers, the grants, the theories... they were all based on a fundamental error i just realized. i've spent my whole life building a monument to a lie. i look in the mirror and i don't even see a person, just a fraud. there's nothing left for me here.
